sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105880" key="tumbopoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τυμβο-ποιός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n105880.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">grave-digger,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1309.tlg001:1:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dialex.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
